matter_status.canadian_path_note: Alberta filing confirmed as pressure device, not primary battlefield. Nigeria remains primary track. Budget capped at $5K.
matter_status.notes: Makir confirmed March 7 that Nigeria is the primary battlefield and Alberta is a pressure filing only. Budget for Alberta capped at $5K total. Strategy is asymmetric — NRG Bloom spends $3K-$5K to force TON to spend $50K-$150K. The MNDA exclusive Alberta jurisdiction clause makes the filing bulletproof against dismissal.

strategy_principles_add: Two-front architecture: Nigeria = battlefield, Alberta = artillery. Alberta filing budget capped at $5K. No Alberta litigation beyond filing + service unless settlement fails completely.
